determinations: DEUTERO-01 Catholic deuterocanon NRSV same-address repair is closed against BibleGateway NRSVA with zero mismatches; remaining rows are governed source-shape/source-scope boundaries, not unresolved text defects.
Greek Esther is accepted for app use in the active NRSV named-Addition form unless a later canonical-form migration policy changes it.
Greek Daniel is accepted for app use in the active NRSV extended-Daniel single-book form unless a later canonical-form migration policy changes it.
3 Maccabees and 4 Maccabees are accepted as source-backed NRSV repairs from BibleGateway NRSVA.
4 Maccabees 10:4 and 11:7-8 remain variant-footnote material excluded from primary active rows unless a later variant apparatus policy is adopted.
No synthetic text, source-row splitting, or active-grid symmetry forcing is authorized or required for this certification.
